name: garfieldapp
description: Automated browser tests for the Garfield Comics PWA.

scripts.test:predeploy: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:unit && playwright test --project=chromium --workers=1 && playwright test --project=mobile-chrome --workers=1 && npm run test:cross-browser -- --workers=1 && npm run test:lighthouse && npm run test:workers
scripts.test:syntax: node --check app.js && node --check adIntegration.js && node --check comicExtractor.js && node --check init.js && node --check googleDriveSync.js && node --check serviceworker.js && node --check tools/supporter-code.mjs && node --check playwright.config.js && node --check playwright.cross-browser.config.js && node --check tests/support/static-server.cjs && node --check tests/support/lighthouse-audit.cjs && node --check tests/support/live-worker-health.cjs
